'''âg-b-j-t''' ('''kagabjetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puff|puff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puff|puff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-b-j-t
|-
! Lemma
| kagabjetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabjetoko|thigabjetoko]] || [[word:jigabjetoko|jigabjetoko]] || [[word:shigabjetoko|shigabjetoko]] || [[word:kigabjetoko|kigabjetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugabjetoko|thuthugabjetoko]] || [[word:jujugabjetoko|jujugabjetoko]] || [[word:shushugabjetoko|shushugabjetoko]] || [[word:kukugabjetoko|kukugabjetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
